name: diagCheckValidPrimitive
title: diagCheckValidPrimitive
syntax: long diagCheckValidPrimitive( diagRequest obj, dword reasonOut[]);
long diagCheckValidPrimitive( diagResponse obj, dword reasonOut[]);
long diagCheckValidPrimitive( diagResponse obj, char primitiveQualifier[]);
long diagCheckValidPrimitive( diagResponse obj, char primitiveQualifier[], dword reasonOut[]);
description: Checks if the given object matches its specification in the diagnostic description.
If a primitive qualifier is given, the definition of that primitive at the object's service is used as specification.

parameters.name: reasonOut
parameters.description: Optional output parameter field for fail reason.

parameters.name: primitiveQualifier
parameters.description: Qualifier of the service primitive that should be used as specification.

availability: Online mode Not for basic diagnostics
Online mode Not for basic diagnostics
